seo.title: PublicSelf — play with how you look on camera, without a real shoot
seo.description: Upload two photos, pick an outfit, choose a pose and background, and see how you look in an AI-generated portrait. Fun, fast, and no booking required. 5 free credits to try.

hero.title: Experiment with how you look on camera, without a real shoot.
hero.description: Upload two photos of yourself, pick an outfit direction, choose a pose and background, and generate. Some results surprise you. Some you'll want to keep. Either way it's fast and low-effort — and you get 5 free credits to find out.
hero.imageAlt: A composed portrait on a dark background — calm presence, tailored look, creative styling
slogans: Outfit, pose, and setting — see how it looks before committing.
Same you, different energy — guided so it still feels like you.
Tune a shot you like instead of starting from scratch every time.

featureCards.title: Build your look
featureCards.body: Upload two photos and shape an outfit direction — formal, casual, or somewhere dramatic.

featureCards.title: Run a photoshoot
featureCards.body: Pick a pose, a background, and optional items. Generate and see what comes back.

featureCards.title: Tune or download
featureCards.body: When a shot is close, use Tune to nudge it. Download whatever you want to keep.

slides.caption: The studio: upload your photos, build a look, run a shoot, and tune the results.

gallery.title: See what you can create
gallery.description: Results people have generated — different outfits, poses, and moods. Not every generation is a keeper, but when one clicks it's worth it.

items.title: Dark studio
items.body: Dark background, clean framing — a simple and strong direction.

items.title: Formal outfit
items.body: Try a suit, tuxedo, or formal direction before you commit to buying one.

items.title: Pose and energy
items.body: Different posture reads differently — relaxed, focused, editorial.

items.title: Outdoor feel
items.body: Change the background context while keeping the same identity.

items.title: Casual direction
items.body: Try a softer, more everyday look to see how it reads on camera.

items.title: Tune refinement
items.body: When a shot is almost right, Tune helps swap or refine a layer.

pricing.title: Ready to go beyond the free credits?
pricing.description: You get 5 free credits when you sign up. If you want more room to iterate, pick a pack here — same prices as inside the studio.

plans.label: Starter
plans.name: PublicSelf Starter
plans.body: Enough to try several outfit and pose directions, compare results, and download the ones you like.

plans.label: Studio
plans.name: PublicSelf Studio
plans.body: More room to iterate — extra poses, more Tune passes, and more keepers without topping up.

sections.title: Upload two photos
sections.subtitle: Full body + face close-up
sections.body: One full-body photo and one face close-up. That's the minimum. Better photos give better results — good lighting, no filters, face clearly visible.

sections.title: Build a look and run a shoot
sections.subtitle: Outfit, pose, background
sections.body: Choose an outfit direction (formal or casual), pick a pose and background from the library, and generate. You direct it; the AI produces the frame.

sections.title: Tune, iterate, or download
sections.subtitle: Keep what works
sections.body: When a generation is close but not quite right, use Tune to swap or refine a layer. Download anything you want to keep. Credits are tries — not guarantees.
